title: Current Achievements and Applications of Transcriptomics in Personalized Cancer Medicine.
author: Supplitt S Karpinski P Sasiadek M Laczmanska I
content: S-EPMC7866970 PMC7866970 Current Achievements and Applications of Transcriptomics in Personalized Cancer Medicine. Over the last decades, transcriptome profiling emerged as one of the most powerful approaches in oncology, providing prognostic and predictive utility for cancer management. The
